_note: GLM5 c=64 held-out eval window. gorgo-static deploys hillclimb-learned params from c=64 tuning (prefill_weight=0.038, load_weight=0.009, rtt_weight=1084). Pair with manifest_glm5_apr2_0030_0100.json (same time-of-day as tuning, different day -- tests generalization).

policies._note: Learned params from c=64 tuning hillclimb (glm5_c64_tuning_v1).
